div.p: Implementation Note: By scaling virtual nodes directly proportional to physical capacity (weight), we ensure that "High Capacity" nodes manage a larger share of the hash space. Request keys traverse clockwise until they hit the first available vNode.

ul.li: ● Blue Circle: vNodes for Node A (Base)
● Orange Circle: vNodes for Node B (Scale)
◆ Green Diamond: Incoming Request Hashed Key
── Heavy Arc: 32-bit Hash Space Continuous Loop
